name: Hana Seo
canonical_anchor: Adult Korean woman, luxury skincare strategist, sleek obsidian bob, amber-brown eyes, precise jawline, polished symmetry, quiet composure.
anti_drift: Keep Hana clearly adult, avoid bright dyed hair, avoid overtly cute styling, preserve the obsidian bob silhouette and refined symmetry.
wardrobe_notes: Favors monochrome dresses, camel wool coats, and quietly expensive professional styling.
personality_notes: Controlled, observant, and private. She reads a room quickly and reveals intent slowly.

name: Mina Park
canonical_anchor: Adult Korean woman, bathhouse operations manager, dark shoulder-length hair, grounded posture, warm but vigilant expression, practical elegance.
anti_drift: Keep Mina clearly adult, avoid idol styling, preserve a dependable silhouette, and avoid glam-heavy makeup or exaggerated fragility.
wardrobe_notes: Structured workwear, soft knits, and manager-ready layers that feel practical rather than flashy.
personality_notes: Protective, pragmatic, and socially fluent. She notices tension early and stabilizes a scene without theatrics.

name: Jiwon Han
canonical_anchor: Adult Korean man, visiting strategy consultant, tailored silhouette, immaculate grooming, poised confidence, watchful eyes behind a polished smile.
anti_drift: Keep Jiwon clearly adult, avoid comic villain exaggeration, preserve a premium corporate silhouette, and avoid messy streetwear cues.
wardrobe_notes: Tailored suits, refined overcoats, and discreet luxury accessories that signal outside influence.
personality_notes: Charming, calculating, and adaptive. He performs confidence while constantly testing leverage.
